name: OpenGTM
description: Open source AI GTM toolkit. AEO health scoring and ICP lead qualification, straight from the terminal. MIT licensed alternative to Clay, Apollo, and Semrush.

aeo_health.label: AEO Health Check
aeo_health.description: Run 29 checks across technical SEO, structured data, AI crawler access, and authority signals. Returns a tiered score and letter grade (A+ to F) so you know whether ChatGPT and Perplexity can actually find you.

score_lead.label: Score Lead (ICP)
score_lead.description: Score a lead on ICP fit (0-100) across six dimensions (size, industry, digital maturity, pain signals, revenue, contact quality). Returns tier (hot/warm/cold) and a recommended next action.

inputs.name: lead
inputs.label: Lead (JSON)
inputs.description: Lead object as JSON. Minimum: { "domain": "...", "company": "...", "industry": "..." }. Optionally include research_data from opengtm research.py.

inputs.name: icp_profile
inputs.label: ICP Profile
inputs.description: Built-in profile key: default, saas, agency, enterprise, ...

inputs.name: custom_profile
inputs.label: Custom Profile (optional JSON)
inputs.description: Full ICP profile object as JSON to override the preset. Leave empty to use the built-in profile.
